examples: Before we could replace the power supply, we would have to remove from the telescope a handrail fixed with four screws.
I knew what it meant: The handrail could be completely pulled off and the safety tether might break, and I might therefore be pushed into space.
Then Houston, the control centre on the earth, called up and told me to use the tape to tape the bottom of the handrail and pull it off the telescope.
The current line runs across the beach from the promenade handrail next to the leisure centre car park.
After several failed attempts to unscrew the bolt on the handrail, the spacewalkers ended up tearing it off with brute force.
